skills.name: Collect delivery evidence
skills.description: Record the tests, checks, and operational evidence that support a completed change.

skills.name: Evaluate the quality model
skills.description: Run the external QUALITY.md evaluation loop against this project's governed quality rubric, if one exists.

skills.name: Load governed specs
skills.description: Load the current global, project-type, and project-scoped specifications before implementation work.

skills.name: Plan from specs
skills.description: Turn governed requirements into an implementation plan and acceptance evidence.

skills.name: Propose, do not self-approve
skills.description: Propose changes to governed specs through review; never approve or publish your own change.

skills.name: Register the task session
skills.description: Open a governed agent session with begin_task before doing non-trivial implementation work.

skills.name: Report spec problems
skills.description: Report ambiguity, contradiction, or outdated guidance instead of guessing around it.

skills.name: Resolve uncovered guidance
skills.description: Pull governed guidance before writing in a language or domain the loaded specs do not cover.

skills.name: Run the compliance loop
skills.description: Confirm objective compliance before claiming a task is complete, and keep working until it passes.

skills.name: Search spec context
skills.description: Find focused governing sections without injecting the entire spec set into context.

skills.name: Verify conformance
skills.description: Check implementation results against the current governed specification set.
